/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libsum_srv_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libsum_srv_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/sum_srv_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/sum_srv_interface/srv/sum__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jinyicheng/auto_navigation/build/sum_srv_interface:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libsum_srv_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
